tiktok's 2026 algorithm change nobody's talking about:

"comment part 2" replies now get 4x the initial push of fresh posts.

why? it signals conversation. algorithm sees engagement loop.

your workflow should be:
1. post video
2. wait for comments
3. reply to best comment with

tested 4 hook formulas across 23 accounts this month.

frustrated > excited
skeptical > impressed
"there's no way this works" > "omg i love this"

negative emotions and curiosity gaps win. happy intros get scrolled past.

your skeptical face is worth more than your happy face.
